arts.ttl: Kehl confirms Malen is "attracting interest on the market" amid Aston Villa links
arts.sum: Sebastian Kehl has commented on reports that Aston Villa are in talks with Borussia Dortmund over the signing of Donyell Malen.

arts.ttl: Fenerbahçe receive conditions to sign Aston Villa player this month
arts.sum: Fenerbahce have been in contact with Aston Villa to discuss the conditions of a move for Diego Carlos this month. That’s according to Ertan Süzgün, who reports that Fenerbahce want to make at least two additions to their defence this summer and have spoken to Aston Villa about Carlos. arts.ttl: Sports director comments as Aston Villa push for transfer – Not surprised by Villans interest
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund sports director Sebastien Kehl has confirmed there is interest in Donyell Malen, with Aston Villa making a bid for him this week. Ruhr Nachrichten cover comments from Kehl today, who insists that the Dutchman is still highly valued by the Bundesliga club. Malen has been linked with a move to Aston Villa throughout The post Sports director comments as Aston Villa push for transfer – Not surprised by Villans interest appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Every word Unai Emery said about transfers, Philogene, fresh injuries and Konsa's best position
arts.sum: “Of course, we are in the transfer window as well, and the club is moving forward to try to increase our level in the squad in case we can sign new players and in case someone has to leave, we are open to doing it. “Of course, to achieve like last year, Champions League, will be fantastic, but we have to try to be demanding, how to do what we want to do in our way we are here, building and respecting the different competitions and different teams.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Leicester Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: After two games without a victory, Aston Villa will be hoping to get back to winning ways when they host Leicester on Saturday. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our score prediction, provided ...

arts.ttl: Club ‘would not oppose’ January transfer as Leicester and Tottenham eye player – Asking price not high
arts.sum: Udinese would be willing to sell defender Thomas Kristensen this month if Tottenham or Leicester City make moves for him. That’s according to Messaggero Veneto, who say both sides have shown an interest in the 22-year-old in this window. A report in England named Leicester and Tottenham as suitors for the Danish centre-back this week, The post Club ‘would not oppose’ January transfer as Leicester and Tottenham eye player – Asking price not high appeared first on Sport Witness.

Fixtures Aston Villa Vs. Leicester City - Sat, Jan 4th 2025, 15:00 Aston Villa continued preparations for Saturday's game against Leicester City at Bodymoor Heath, as 2025 got underway. Unai Emery's side wrapped up 2024 on Monday, with a 2-2 draw against Brighton & Hove Albion at Villa Park, and will welcome the Foxes to B6 this weekend in their first outing of the New Year. The Villans brought in 2025 by continuing to work on the training pitch ahead of their next clash, in which they will look to complete a first Premier League double of the campaign, having triumphed 2-1 at the King Power Stadium on the final day of August. View a gallery of training images below...

arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Aston Villa and Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery makes stance clear on Jaden Philogene as Aston Villa transfer plan revealed
arts.sum: But after only starting two league games this season, Philogene could now head back out on loan from Villa with Ipswich and a number of other clubs expressing an interest in him. arts.ttl: 'A very long time' - Former Leicester City star Wesley Fofana suffers devastating injury blow - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: Former Leicester City defender Wesley Fofana has suffered another long-term injury, Enzo Maresca has confirmed. "Unfortunately Wes [Fofana] will be out for a very long time," he said.
